prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model. Historical daily returns for SYK over the last 5 years were used to estimate the annualized drift (mean return) and volatility. The calculated annual drift is 16.10%, and annual volatility is 19.97%. These parameters, along with the current price of $387.46, were used to project the price in 21 trading days (approximately 0.08 years). The GBM model assumes that stock prices follow a log-normal distribution, meaning price changes are proportional to the current price. The point estimate represents the median of this projected distribution. The confidence intervals indicate the range within which the price is expected to fall with the specified probability, derived from the log-normal distribution's properties.
